s2det_yolov8s.name: Object Detection · s2det-yolov8s
s2det_yolov8s.description: Optional local YOLOv8s detector. Set enabled=true after configuring python and weights.

segearth_ov.name: Semantic Segmentation · SegEarth-OV
segearth_ov.description: Optional local SegEarth-OV backend. Configure only when the environment and weights are available.

sam3.name: Interactive Segmentation · SAM
sam3.description: Recommended as a separate GPU model service for interactive segmentation.

remote_detector.name: Remote Model Service
remote_detector.description: Optional external model backend. You can also use the Custom Model block in the UI.

mock_backend.name: Demo Mock Pre-annotation
mock_backend.description: Demo backend for testing the platform workflow without model dependencies.
